reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención del personal. El diesel 500 (común) para motores aspirados, no me convence, falta reaccion y hay exceso de humo. Debo agregar un mejorador de combustión. No me sucede con otras marcas como Shell y ahora Puma

(Translated by Google)
The staff was very helpful. However, I'm not convinced by the 500 (regular) diesel for naturally aspirated engines; it lacks power and produces excessive smoke. I need to add a combustion enhancer. This doesn't happen with other brands like Shell and now Puma.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7506649888060018425/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQwdE9xeGtBRRAB

reviews.comment:
En stock center tenian una promoción con las tarjetas de crédito del bco nación del 30% según la publicidad individual de la vidriera entre los dias 20 y 22/9.  Al realizar la compra me dan un comprobante de la  promoción, pero con el 15%... VERGONZOSO!

(Translated by Google)
At Stock Center, they had a 30% off promotion on Bank of America credit cards, according to the individual advertisement in the window, between September 20th and 22nd. When I made my purchase, they gave me a receipt for the promotion, but with the 15% discount... SHAMEFUL!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7506649888060018425/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMwNXRQbnN3RRAB
